summary: Iteration 3 testing of InkBook new features: Stripe subscription (Basic €29/Pro €79), Artists CRUD, Booking reschedule modal, and Resend email notifications. All backend APIs pass (13/13). UI flows verified with Playwright.

minor.issue: Resend API key is active but email fails with: 'You can only send testing emails to your own email address (ole.hellwig1512@gmail.com). Verify a domain at resend.com/domains and change the `from` address.' This is a Resend domain verification config issue, not a code bug.

action_items: Resend email: Verify a custom domain at resend.com/domains and update SENDER_EMAIL in backend/.env from 'onboarding@resend.dev' to an email using that verified domain. The API key is active but Resend restricts test keys to sending only to the account owner email (ole.hellwig1512@gmail.com).
critical_code_review_comments: Email send works correctly in code but Resend domain not verified - production emails will fail for all non-owner recipients until domain is verified.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all features verified: subscription page (Basic €29/Pro €79 with compare table), Studio Dashboard Abo button + 5 tabs including Artists, Artists tab with 'Artist hinzufügen' button, Studio detail page with Artists(0) tab, Customer Dashboard Umbuchen button, Reschedule modal with date picker and slot selection

seed_data_creation: Test booking created (book_9a78b3f34300) for email test - can be cleaned up
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features working: 1) Stripe subscription page /subscription shows Basic €29/Pro €79 with compare table, checkout creates Stripe URL. 2) Artists CRUD fully working - POST/GET/DELETE verified via API and UI. 3) Reschedule modal working in CustomerDashboard - date picker shows available slots. 4) Resend API key IS set and making real calls, but fails due to unverified domain - need to verify domain at resend.com. Auth uses httpOnly cookies (no Bearer tokens). Plans endpoint returns dict {basic:..., pro:...} not list.

rca_of_email_issue.issue: Email send fails with Resend API
rca_of_email_issue.root_cause: SENDER_EMAIL is set to 'onboarding@resend.dev' which is not a verified domain for this Resend account. The test API key only allows sending to the account owner's email (ole.hellwig1512@gmail.com).
rca_of_email_issue.reproduction: POST /api/bookings -> check backend logs -> 'Email send failed: You can only send testing emails to your own email address'
rca_of_email_issue.mitigation: 1. Verify a custom domain at resend.com/domains, 2. Update SENDER_EMAIL in backend/.env to use that verified domain (e.g., noreply@yourdomain.com)
